reasoning: VIX at 30.83 and rising 4.47% signals extreme fear regime, strongly favoring bearish setups. BEAR ribbon stack (fast 672.42, slow 673.53) with $1.11 spread confirms downside pressure. Sector rotation weak (XLE -1.01%, XLK -0.38%) indicates risk-off positioning. No macro events scheduled today—the spike is internally driven, likely from overnight position resets or FX stress. Confidence at 0.68 because at VIX 30.83, we're near exhaustion levels; any bounce would favor bullish entries on confirmed reversals. Premium is very expensive across both puts and calls.
